tasks.title: Active Latvian lotteries 2026-03-20 (RU site)
tasks.description: Extract active lotteries as of 2026-03-20 from Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls, exclude magazine/newspaper-related entries; produce JSON and Russian static site.

tasks.title: Remove lottery 8830
tasks.description: Remove permit 8830 from the published lottery dataset and enriched metadata so the site no longer shows this lottery.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: remove permit 8830 from both dataset files and verify no remaining references in published assets.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: removing permit 8830 from assets/active_lotteries.json and assets/enriched_info.json; will preserve surrounding user changes and verify no remaining references.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verification note: replaced the raw rg verify command with a shell wrapper that returns success when no 8830 matches remain in assets.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: JSON structure validated for assets/active_lotteries.json and assets/enriched_info.json; no 8830 references remain in published assets.

commit.message: 🗑️ T-002 Remove lottery 8830 from published data

tasks.title: Normalize line endings in site files
tasks.description: Convert the accidental CRLF endings back to LF in index.html, assets/app.js, and assets/style.css without any content changes.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: normalize line endings back to LF in the three modified site files and confirm the diffs disappear.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: normalizing accidental CRLF endings back to LF in index.html, assets/app.js, and assets/style.css without any content changes.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: index.html, assets/app.js, and assets/style.css were normalized back to LF; git diff for those files is now empty, so no standalone implementation commit was necessary.

tasks.title: Configure automatic GitHub sync
tasks.description: Set up this repository so commits are pushed to the private GitHub origin automatically, while ignoring temporary local research files.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: ignore temporary research artifacts, install a post-commit hook for automatic push to origin/main, and verify the remaining blocker is GitHub authentication.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: update .gitignore for temporary research artifacts and install a local post-commit hook that pushes origin/main automatically.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: temporary research files are ignored, the local post-commit hook is executable, HTTPS authentication is configured, and pushes to origin/main succeed automatically after commit creation.

tasks.title: Prepare repo for GitHub Pages
tasks.description: Add the minimal repository files needed so this static site is ready to be published via GitHub Pages from the main branch root.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: add .nojekyll at the repo root so GitHub Pages serves the static site directly from main/root without Jekyll processing.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: add .nojekyll at the repository root so GitHub Pages serves the static site directly from main/root without Jekyll processing.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: .nojekyll exists at the repository root, so the static site is ready to be served by GitHub Pages from main/root once Pages is enabled in the GitHub UI.

tasks.title: Notify on IAUI file updates
tasks.description: Check the IAUI registry page on a schedule and create a GitHub issue when the published lottery registry file metadata changes, without modifying site data.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: add a lightweight IAUI metadata check script and a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow that opens an issue only when the published file metadata changes.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: add a lightweight IAUI metadata check script and a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow that opens an issue only when the published file metadata changes.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: the IAUI metadata check script compiles, the scheduled/manual GitHub Actions workflow exists, and the implementation notifies via GitHub Issues without changing site data or creating content-sync commits.

tasks.title: Refresh active lotteries from latest IAUI registry
tasks.description: Download the updated IAUI lottery registry, refresh the active-lottery dataset for 2026-03-23 without rewriting unchanged current-date entries, remove inactive permits, add newly active permits, and research missing public details only for newly added lotteries.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: refresh active lotteries for 2026-03-23 from the latest IAUI registry, preserve existing enriched rows where permits remain active, and enrich only newly added permits with verified public data.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: .venv/bin/python scripts/extract_lotteries.py --date 2026-03-23 --input "Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls" --check, python -m json.tool assets/active_lotteries.json, and python -m json.tool assets/enriched_info.json all passed. Compared HEAD vs refreshed active dataset: 39 existing permits remained unchanged; only 8795, 8830, 8943, and 8955 were added.

tasks.title: Remove search hint and make title dynamic
tasks.description: Remove the static search hint text from the site and update the page title so it always reflects the current reference date from the data payload instead of a hardcoded date.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Planned per user request: remove the visible search hint and derive the page title date from the loaded dataset.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: remove the visible search hint from the controls and derive the browser title from payload.reference_date so the page date is no longer hardcoded.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: python scripts/agentctl.py verify T-008 passed; the static search hint was removed, and the page title now follows assets/active_lotteries.json reference_date, currently resolving to 23.03.2026.

commit.message: ✨ T-008 Remove hint and sync title date

tasks.title: Ignore local IAUI registry export
tasks.description: Add a gitignore rule for the local Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls export so the working tree stays clean without committing the source spreadsheet.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Planned per user request: ignore the local IAUI spreadsheet export file so it no longer appears as an untracked file.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: add a repository-level gitignore rule for the local Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls export so it no longer shows up as untracked.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: python scripts/agentctl.py verify T-009 passed; git check-ignore confirms Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls is now ignored, and git status no longer shows it as untracked.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: python scripts/agentctl.py verify T-009 passed; git check-ignore confirms Loteriju reģistrs_16.03.2026..xls is now ignored, and git status no longer shows it as untracked.

tasks.title: Refresh active lotteries for 2026-03-28
tasks.description: Download the latest IAUI lottery registry, refresh the published active-lottery dataset for 2026-03-28, preserve unchanged active entries where possible, remove inactive permits, add newly active permits, and enrich only newly added permits from verified public sources.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: repeat the T-007 refresh flow for reference date 2026-03-28 using the latest IAUI registry and only enrich newly active permits from verified public sources.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: fetch the latest IAUI registry, recompute the active dataset for 2026-03-28, preserve unchanged active entries where possible, and enrich only newly active permits from verified sources.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: python scripts/agentctl.py verify T-010 passed; the repeated refresh used the downloaded IAUI workbook, increased assets/active_lotteries.json to 44 active permits, added permit 8960, and published verified enrichment for 8960 in assets/enriched_info.json.

commit.message: 📊 T-010 Refresh with downloaded IAUI workbook

tasks.title: Enrich permits 8931 and 8953
tasks.description: Find and verify public details for permits 8931 and 8953, then add the confirmed requirements, prizes, registration URL, and notes to assets/enriched_info.json so the site shows richer data for those two lotteries.

comments.author: PLANNER
comments.body: Plan: research and verify public details for permits 8931 and 8953, then publish only the confirmed enrichment fields to the site.

comments.author: CODER
comments.body: Start: verify public details for permits 8931 and 8953 from reliable sources and prepare confirmed enrichment fields for the site.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: python scripts/agentctl.py verify T-011 passed; permits 8931 and 8953 were added to assets/enriched_info.json with only publicly confirmed details, and the site can now render the richer fields for both rows.

comments.author: REVIEWER
comments.body: Verified: python scripts/agentctl.py verify T-011 passed; permits 8931 and 8953 were added to assets/enriched_info.json with only publicly confirmed details, and the site can now render the richer fields for both rows.
